title: Migrate Production Database from Cloudways to AWS RDS
description:
Migrate the production database from Cloudways to AWS RDS. The migration was completed in October 2025.

### Migration Steps
1. Export the database from Cloudways
2. Import into AWS RDS
3. Update the `.env` file in the Laravel application with the new AWS database connection settings

More details are documented on Confluence.
acceptance_criteria: Production database is running on AWS RDS
Laravel .env file points to the new AWS RDS connection
Application functions correctly with the new database
Cloudways database is no longer used for production
middleware_changes: Laravel .env updated with new AWS RDS connection string.
implementation_notes: Migration completed in October 2025. Standard export/import approach with .env update.
comment_summary: Developer outlined the migration steps: export from Cloudways, import to AWS, update .env.
